assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 2 (L4 inference pool) and Phase 3 (A100 pool) with distinct upgrade strategies - surge upgrades for L4s and coordinated approach for A100s

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: While response recommends surge upgrade, it uses maxSurge=20 which is much higher than the expected 1 or 2, not meeting the specific requirement

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking GPU drivers and CUDA compatibility with 1.32 but does not specifically address compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends preventing new fine-tuning jobs during upgrade window and waiting for current jobs to complete before upgrading A100 pool

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that GPU VMs do not support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a PodDisruptionBudget example with minAvailable: 80% for inference services and mentions checking existing PDBs

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not address the specific issue that auto-scaler created nodes during upgrade will be at old version until pool upgrade completes

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking compatibility but does not specifically recommend testing in staging environment before production upgrade
